tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsAppAttestConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the AppAttestConfigs for the specified list of apps.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsDebugTokensCreate
tools.description: Creates a new DebugToken for the specified app. For security reasons, after the creation operation completes, the `token` field cannot be updated or retrieved, but you can revoke the debug token using DeleteDebugToken. Each app can have a maximum of 20 debug tokens.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsDebugTokensDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified DebugToken. A deleted debug token cannot be used to exchange for an App Check token. Use this method when you suspect the secret `token` has been compromised or when you no longer need the debug token.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsDebugTokensList
tools.description: Lists all DebugTokens for the specified app. For security reasons, the `token` field is never populated in the response.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsDeviceCheckConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the DeviceCheckConfigs for the specified list of apps. For security reasons, the `private_key` field is never populated in the response.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeAppAttestAssertion
tools.description: Accepts an App Attest assertion and an artifact previously obtained from ExchangeAppAttestAttestation and verifies those with Apple. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeAppAttestAttestation
tools.description: Accepts an App Attest CBOR attestation and verifies it with Apple using your preconfigured team and bundle IDs. If valid, returns an attestation artifact that can later be exchanged for an AppCheckToken using ExchangeAppAttestAssertion. For convenience and performance, this method's response object will also contain an AppCheckToken (if the verification is successful).

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeCustomToken
tools.description: Validates a custom token signed using your project's Admin SDK service account credentials. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeDebugToken
tools.description: Validates a debug token secret that you have previously created using CreateDebugToken. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken. Note that a restrictive quota is enforced on this method to prevent accidental exposure of the app to abuse.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeDeviceCheckToken
tools.description: Accepts a [`device_token`](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/devicecheck/dcdevice) issued by DeviceCheck, and attempts to validate it with Apple. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangePlayIntegrityToken
tools.description: Validates an [integrity verdict response token from Play Integrity](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/verdict#decrypt-verify). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeRecaptchaEnterpriseToken
tools.description: Validates a [reCAPTCHA Enterprise response token](https://cloud.google.com/recaptcha-enterprise/docs/create-assessment#retrieve_token). If valid, returns an App Check token AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeRecaptchaToken
tools.description: Validates a [reCAPTCHA v3 response token](https://developers.google.com/recaptcha/docs/v3). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeRecaptchaV3Token
tools.description: Validates a [reCAPTCHA v3 response token](https://developers.google.com/recaptcha/docs/v3). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsExchangeSafetyNetToken
tools.description: Validates a [SafetyNet token](https://developer.android.com/training/safetynet/attestation#request-attestation-step). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsGenerateAppAttestChallenge
tools.description: Generates a challenge that protects the integrity of an immediately following call to ExchangeAppAttestAttestation or ExchangeAppAttestAssertion. A challenge should not be reused for multiple calls.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsGeneratePlayIntegrityChallenge
tools.description: Generates a challenge that protects the integrity of an immediately following integrity verdict request to the Play Integrity API. The next call to ExchangePlayIntegrityToken using the resulting integrity token will verify the presence and validity of the challenge. A challenge should not be reused for multiple calls.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsPlayIntegrityConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the PlayIntegrityConfigs for the specified list of apps.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsRecaptchaConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the RecaptchaConfigs for the specified list of apps. For security reasons, the `site_secret` field is never populated in the response.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsRecaptchaEnterpriseConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the RecaptchaEnterpriseConfigs for the specified list of apps.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsRecaptchaV3ConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the RecaptchaV3Configs for the specified list of apps. For security reasons, the `site_secret` field is never populated in the response.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsAppsSafetyNetConfigBatchGet
tools.description: Atomically gets the SafetyNetConfigs for the specified list of apps.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsServicesBatchUpdate
tools.description: Atomically updates the specified Service configurations.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsServicesGet
tools.description: Gets the Service configuration for the specified service name.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsServicesList
tools.description: Lists all Service configurations for the specified project. Only Services which were explicitly configured using UpdateService or BatchUpdateServices will be returned.

tools.name: projects.firebaseappcheckProjectsServicesPatch
tools.description: Updates the specified Service configuration.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
